article.body_preview:
TANGAIL, Jan 15, 2023 (BSS) - Agriculture Minister Dr Abdur Razzaq today said the government is implementing three- year roadmap to reduce import dependency of cooking oil through 50 percent production of oil.

"We are importing 90 percent cooking oil to meet domestic demand costing Taka 25 thousand crore each year," he said while visiting mustard crop field in Dhanbari upazila of Tangail district.

As part of the three-year roadmap, mustard cultivation has increased sharply in the country, Razz
